prompt: A {argument name="age" default="22"}-year-old {argument name="ethnicity" default="East Asian"} girl, round youthful face, large bright doe eyes with natural lashes, rosy cheeks, soft pink lip gloss, two-strand loose braids with baby hairs. Wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="pastel lavender oversized hoodie"}. Background: blurred Japanese convenience store interior at night, neon light reflections adding color pops. Expression: playful, bubbly, genuinely happy. Aesthetic: Douyin/TikTok influencer portrait, soft beauty filter quality, warm skin tone, natural light. Photorealistic, 8K.16:9
translatedPrompt: 一位 {argument name="age" default="22"} 岁的 {argument name="ethnicity" default="East Asian"} 女孩，圆润的青春脸庞，明亮的大眼睛配以自然睫毛，粉嫩脸颊，柔和的粉色唇彩，双侧松散编发并带有碎发。身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="淡紫色超大款连帽衫"}。背景：夜晚模糊的日本便利店室内，霓虹灯反射增添色彩感。表情：俏皮、活泼、真诚快乐。美学：抖音 / TikTok 网红肖像，柔和美颜滤镜质感，暖色调皮肤，自然光。超写实，8K，16:9

breakdown.creativeCore: 东亚女孩网红肖像：一份详细的超写实提示词，用于生成具有社交媒体美感的日本便利店场景下的青春肖像。
breakdown.subject: 空间
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light, neon]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
